title: QOLptimize!
description: A simple modpack that optimizes your game and adds features players commonly use!
body:
# What is QOLptimize?
QOLptimized is a modpack that aims to optimize your game while also having quality of life features and recreating the feel and features of optifine.

**Below are some features of QOLptimize**


# Better FPS
QOLptimize adds numeral optimization mods to make sure your game runs at top speeds!

# Quality of life features
QOLptimize adds mods like: 
- #### Zoomify
- #### BetterF3
- #### Gamma Utils

# Optifine support
Got a texture pack that uses CIT?
Play on a server that needs CIT textures?
You're in luck as QOLptimize adds CIT compatiblity!

# Fixes
Fixes a few issues/bugs in the base game. For example the invisible lines appearing between pixels on items.

# Fast boot times
Adds mods that make your game launch way faster!

# Summary
QOLptimize while being mainly a optimization modpack adds a few nice quality of life features while staying true to the vanilla game.

# Mod list

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- BetterF3
- Capes
- Cloth Config v17
- Clumps
- Continuity
- Dark Loading Screen
- Debugify
- Entity Texture Features
- Fabric API
- Fabric Language Kotlin
- FerriteCore
- Gamma Utils
- ImmediatelyFast
- Iris
- Lithium
- Mod Menu

- ModernFix
- More Culling
- No Chat Reports
